final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] data_in_0,
    input [3:0] in2,
    input [3:0] in3,
    input [3:0] in4,
    input sel1,
    input sel2,
    output reg [3:0] out_always
);always @(*) begin
    if(sel1 == 0 && sel2 == 0) begin
        out_always = data_in_0;
    end
    else if(sel1 == 0 && sel2 == 1) begin
        out_always = in2;
    end
    else if(sel1 == 1 && sel2 == 0) begin
        out_always = in3;
    end
    else begin
        out_always = in4;
    end
end

endmodule
